response.global_summary: The video features a conversation between two VTubers, Hoshimachi Suisei and Mori Calliope, discussing their birthdays, a past performance, and holding a poll for their viewers to vote on a song for an upcoming members-only stream. No vocal song is performed in this video.

scenes.description: The VTubers Hoshimachi Suisei and Mori Calliope greet their audience and discuss their birthdays and a previous performance.
The VTubers Hoshimachi Suisei and Mori Calliope discuss a future members-only stream and conduct a poll for their audience to vote on a song performance.
